title: Supercharge the Goals Widget - filter then show up to 500 items?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello I would love to suggest to edit the Goals Beta “Widget” to allow it to work across for more items.

Can a filter to be applied before showing results to allow to use on larger boards!

image843×275 14.1 KB

Hoping other dashboard lovers will vote to support my cause!!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks all for the votes
